create_time.description: Timestamp marking when the Redis cluster was created

discovery_endpoints.description: List of endpoints for connecting to the Redis cluster nodes

id.description: Unique identifier for the Redis cluster used in configurations

maintenance_schedule.description: Details of planned maintenance events for the Redis cluster

precise_size_gb.description: Exact storage size of the Redis cluster in gigabytes

psc_connections.description: Private Service Connect connections established for the Redis cluster

psc_service_attachments.description: Service attachment references for Private Service Connect usage

size_gb.description: Rounded storage size of the Redis cluster in gigabytes

state.description: Current operational state of the Redis cluster

state_info.description: Additional details about the Redis cluster's state

uid.description: Globally unique ID for the Redis cluster across regions
